# One Page Go

> One Page Go 是台灣的單頁式網頁應用製作服務，為小型商家提供微型電商、線上訂單系統、線上預約、團購管理與活動售票等方案。採用 GitHub Pages + Google Apps Script + Google Sheets 免費架構，NT$2,500 起一次付清、終身免月費、無交易抽成，所有訂單與顧客資料存在商家自己的 Google 帳號。One Page Go is a Taiwan-based single-page web-app service for small businesses: online ordering systems, micro e-commerce, booking, group-buy and ticketing — pay once, no monthly fees, no transaction cut, data stays in the merchant's own Google account.

## 方案 Solutions
- [線上訂單系統（餐廳・飲料店・零售）](https://one-page-go.com/solutions/order-system/): 網路接單系統，手機下單、訂單追蹤、客戶訂單管理，免月費買斷 / online ordering & order management system for restaurants, drink shops and retail
- [微型電商 Demo](https://one-page-go.com/demos/ecommerce/): 商品展示 + 多品項選購 + 訂單通知
- [線上預約 Demo](https://one-page-go.com/demos/booking/): 服務項目 + 預約時段 + 容量管理
- [團購 Demo](https://one-page-go.com/demos/groupbuy/): 開團 / 跟團 / 成團追蹤
- [活動售票 Demo](https://one-page-go.com/demos/ticketing/): 線上購票 + 電子簽到

- [免費架站工具比較：GitHub Pages vs Wix vs Squarespace vs 開店平台](https://one-page-go.com/blog/free-website-builder-comparison/)
